key.prompt: Character portrait bust for a JRPG dialogue box. Half-body, facing slightly toward the viewer, lit by warm lantern light at night, plain very dark brown background, no text, no watermark, no frame, no border. A gentle young man in his late twenties: the village lamplighter. Neat black hair in an undercut swept back, curious dark brown eyes, warm friendly features, a calm kind manner. He wears a dark-teal asymmetric shoulder-cape clasped at one shoulder with a small brass flame-shaped pin, over a cream band-collar shirt, with a single leather strap across his chest holding a slim brass wick-case. Art style: modern JRPG key art — crisp anime line work with soft painterly cel shading, glowing warm rim light, rich color depth.

vesper.desc: A charming, beautiful young woman in her late twenties: a traveling mapmaker. Copper-auburn hair in a loose windswept side braid, light freckles, bright teal-green eyes, a wry confident half-smile. She wears a sea-teal traveler's coat with a dusty-rose scarf and a leather map-satchel strap across her chest.

maren.desc: A wiry, sun-browned girl of seventeen: a rapids-runner from the river village of Dellhollow. Short choppy dark-brown hair tied back with a strip of faded off-white sailcloth, bright hazel eyes with a green-gold glint, and a big ready grin she is only just barely suppressing — a warm neutral face on the very edge of breaking into a grin. She wears a striped cream-and-teal river-shirt with sleeves rolled to the elbow under a faded blue canvas vest, rolled canvas trousers to mid-calf, short lace boots, a bracelet of knotted cord and little cork floats on her right wrist, and rows of small charcoal tally marks up her left forearm. She is a capable adolescent — clearly younger than twenty, but not a child.

key.prompt: Character portrait bust for a JRPG dialogue box. Half-body framing that includes her forearms — arms loosely crossed at the waist so both forearms are visible in frame. Facing slightly toward the viewer, lit by warm lantern light at night, plain very dark brown background. A wiry, sun-browned girl of seventeen: a rapids-runner from the river village of Dellhollow. Short choppy dark-brown hair tied back with a strip of faded off-white sailcloth. Bright hazel eyes with a green-gold glint. A big ready grin she is only just barely suppressing. Striped cream-and-teal river-shirt with sleeves rolled to the elbow under a faded blue canvas vest, cord-and-cork bracelet on her right wrist, rows of charcoal tally marks up her left forearm. Modern JRPG key art style.

bust.prompt: Two-ref redraw: character = maren/bust-key.png, medium = vesper/bust.png (STYLE ONLY) — hand-drawn colored pencil on warm toned paper, visible strokes, cross-hatching, bare-paper highlights.

expr:happy.prompt: Change ONLY the expression: the grin fully loosed — a huge bright open grin, teeth showing, eyes crinkled up with pure delight.

expr:determined.prompt: Change ONLY the expression: jaw set, eyes alight and locked forward with fierce focus, the grin compressed into a sharp ready edge — the face before running a rapid.

expr:awed.prompt: Change ONLY the expression: awe — eyes wide and shining, brows lifted, lips parted, the grin forgotten: first sight of something bigger than her river.

pose:front.prompt: Two-ref field sprite: character = own bust-key, style = vesper/pose.png (STYLE ONLY). Slightly chibi ~2.9 heads, wiry adolescent build, flat magenta #FF00FF background. Front view; tally marks on her left forearm (viewer-right), bracelet on her right wrist (viewer-left).

pose:back.prompt: Two-ref field sprite: character = own bust-key, style = vesper/pose.png (STYLE ONLY). Slightly chibi ~2.9 heads, wiry adolescent build, flat magenta #FF00FF background. Back view, sailcloth knot visible, no face.

pose:side.prompt: Two-ref field sprite: character = own bust-key, style = vesper/pose.png (STYLE ONLY). Slightly chibi ~2.9 heads, wiry adolescent build, flat magenta #FF00FF background. STRICT RIGHT side profile.

sheet.prompt: Packed with tools/sprites.py: pack sheet.png 0:pose-front 1:pose-back 2:pose-side, then despeckled.

odessa.desc: A broad-shouldered guildmother in her fifties: mistress of the river-barge guild of Dellhollow. A weathered, handsome, strong-boned face with iron dignity — calm level gaze, faint lines of wind and years. Grey-streaked dark hair coiled into a thick rope-like braid pinned up around her head. She wears a long dark oilskin coat with the collar open over a cream cable-knit gansey sweater, heavy leather work gloves folded and tucked under her wide belt at the hip (not worn), and a small brass whistle hanging on a cord around her neck. Composed, commanding, quietly kind.

key.prompt: Character portrait bust for a JRPG dialogue box. A broad-shouldered guildmother in her fifties: mistress of the river-barge guild of Dellhollow. Weathered handsome strong-boned face with iron dignity, grey-streaked dark hair in a thick rope-coil braid pinned up. Long dark oilskin coat over a cream cable-knit gansey sweater, brass whistle on a cord, hands bare with heavy leather work gloves folded and tucked under her belt. Modern JRPG key art style.

bust.prompt: Two-ref redraw: character = odessa/bust-key.png, medium = vesper/bust.png (STYLE ONLY) — hand-drawn colored pencil on warm toned paper.

expr:grave.prompt: Change ONLY the expression: grave — mouth a firm level line, jaw set, steady serious eyes carrying heavy responsibility. (Generated via a 768px copy of the bust ref; the full-size ref tripped the generator.)

expr:warm.prompt: Change ONLY the expression: a rare small smile — corners of her mouth just lifting, eyes warming, iron dignity melting a little. (768px ref workaround.)

pose:front.prompt: Two-ref field sprite, style = vesper/pose.png. ~3 heads, broad-shouldered and sturdy, a little taller than the reference. Front view, flat magenta.

pose:back.prompt: Back view — pinned coil braid visible, no face. Flat magenta.

pose:side.prompt: STRICT RIGHT side profile. Flat magenta.

sheet.prompt: Packed with tools/sprites.py: pack sheet.png 0:pose-front 1:pose-back 2:pose-side, then despeckled.

tenant.desc: The Tenant — an enormous ancient river eel: barge-sized, mottled moss-green and bronze, old scars, one pale clouded eye, whiskered chin. Calm and immense, never monstrous — an old river god without the divinity. Scene-layered art pieces on magenta, not a sprite-sheet character.

head.prompt: Head and pale clouded eye rising from an isolated patch of dark green river water, painted in the scene-painting family style, on flat magenta #FF00FF for keying. Calm-immense, mouth closed, no aggression.

coil.prompt: One single arch of her immense body breaking the water surface — whale-back hump with dorsal-fin ridge, same hide and scars, both ends under water, isolated water patch on flat magenta.

boat.desc: Small clinker-built wooden river craft: tar-dark hull, sculling oar, rope fenders, lantern hook at the prow. No crew. Keyed art pieces on magenta; side view is strict right-facing (flipped in engine).

side.prompt: STRICT right-facing lateral side profile, bow (lantern hook) at the right, tar-dark lapstrake hull, oar inboard, rope fenders, empty, flat magenta.

front.prompt: Bow-on view from the slightly elevated game camera, tar-dark exterior planks, rope fenders both sides, lantern hook at the prow tip, empty, flat magenta.
